content.content: Thread posts should be concise and conversational. Use short paragraphs and engaging hooks.
Optimal Thread length is 250-280 characters. Use line breaks for readability.
Casual, authentic tone works best. Use emojis sparingly. Focus on starting conversations.
Facebook posts should be engaging and include calls to action. Visual content performs better.
Optimal length is 40-80 characters. Posts with questions get more engagement.
Mix professional and casual tone. Use relevant hashtags. Include strong visuals.
SEO 최적화를 위한 키워드 배치가 중요. 단락 구분과 서브헤딩 활용.
2000-3000자 내외의 긴 글 선호. 이미지와 텍스트의 적절한 배치.
전문적이고 정보성 있는 콘텐츠. 목차와 단락 구분 명확히.
